# SFML Setup

Meson-Conan-CCache MinGW also with MVSC profile if u want to use it.

Steps

* run setup
* that's all



Steps for Qt as IDE

* run setup
* Open Qt -> OpenFile or Project -> click meson.build
* Choose any compiler option
* Change the buid/run config -> 

  * Build -> Build directory: -> Browse -> Select /meson-build
* Optional: delete the default build folder generated by Qt.
